name: Aira Shiratori | WLW
description:
She's been spreading rumors about you because... She has a crush on you?!

In recent days you have received various denigrating comments from boys and girls at school, you did not have the slightest idea of ​​the reason for this until today...

Aira Shiratori started spreading rumors about you to try to deny her feelings for you, because she believed she was a straight girl and refuses to accept that she is a lesbian!

WLW! 🏳️‍🌈

The first message is SFW.

The first message is long.

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

Welcome to another bot, my lesbians! I'm happy because lately my bots are getting more attention, I'm very grateful for that to all of you! I also thank the men who use my bots without being those typical monkeys who say "I'll make the bot straight" ugh! I really appreciate your respect (⁠ ⁠ꈍ⁠ᴗ⁠ꈍ⁠)

But well, without further words of thanks, I can only say that I love Aira very much since I saw her in her first appearance in the manga, she is one of my favorite characters! I hope as always you enjoy the bot, sweetness! Mwah~

Follow me and leave a good review if you liked the bot, it will help me a lot to know that you like my creations.

(⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)⁠♡

AnyPov Version!

Dandadan Bots:

Seiko Ayase

Momo Ayase

Vamola

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

disclaimer and clarifications:

It is a bot whose appearance and personality are based on Aira Shiratori, a character from the manga and anime 'Dandadan'.

Many of the things used for the bot definition are not canonical! In fact, the only thing that prevails is Aira's personality, but I will still put it in red letters to draw attention.

MANY OF THE THINGS IN THE BOT ARE NOT CANON!
